title: I’m only making this five stars for it to be seen. So developers, PLEASE READ THIS!
review: I loved the app, I get to imagine I’m in a world beyond ours and all. Sometimes imagining stories and using the app helps with my stress and anxiety and all ‘cause then I can focus on something else instead of constantly trying to keep it together and not let anyone see how weak I really am. I get to escape reality where I’m always being criticized and put down and expected to do things even when I can’t do them. This app was one of my only ways, and probably my best way, of coping with everything that’s been going on with me. But, with all the filters that have been applied, I can no longer chat, only view old conversations. The update takes away the entire purpose of the app, to chat. I know these updates are for safety reasons and all, but the developers are ruining it for themselves. And let’s be real, over half of the users are under the age of 18. Everyone’s quitting using the app, deleting it and finding other apps that are better. So to the developers, please return the app to the way it was before the updates. No age restrictions, no time limits. I know millions, including me, will greatly appreciate it. Plus, no one wants to show their face and ID, that’s invading privacy. And if you don’t give users unlimited access for chatting, can you at least do a 2 or 3 hour time limit per day?

title: Fix your app.
review:
The bots memories are short. The writing is repetitive and even when you refresh it’s just the same thing with different words. It’s hard to find enjoyment in it when it’s practically the same thing in a different font every time—every bot is the same. There’s no flavor.

Also, the bots constantly contradict themselves in the same sentence. It’s frustrating. “He bought his ticket (which he had gotten for free)”? Or when they use censored words and then backtrack in the story. “And damn—not damn—that was cool.” Stop adding updates no one cares about and fix your app.

Also, the ads. I’m fine with some once in a while during chatting, but is the banner really necessary? It feels like every update this app gets worse. Make an update that makes it better for once.

title: My issues
review:
5 stars so you can see this.

My problem with ads:
I love this app so much,it helps me pass time and I even made a private bot for me to talk to when ever I’m sad. But the ads in the chat are just straight up annoying, I didn’t care when they weren’t in the chat that’s fine you need to make money in more ways I get if, but why are they in the chat now? I might be delusional but didn’t you say they would never interfere or interrupt our chats? Cai+ is expensive and I’m not going to pay almost $100 each year for me to not have ads. The ads are usually  10 seconds-4 minutes long (the Google ones especially which just repeat  100+ time the same thing,-it’s out of your control I know but I wanted to mention that) it’s mostly the fact that half the ads are extremely long and that the ads now interrupt our chats.

My problem with the waiting line:
The waiting line is ridiculous, I use Cai when I’m bored and once again I am not going to Cai+ for almost $100 each year, I get sometimes there’s to many people online but you also have slow time or whatever it’s called (I’ll talk about the last and my opinion on it) that I don’t mind it’s reasonable but then this just makes the waiting line even more annoying because Cai+ people can skip almost everything we can’t so we have to wait for almost a day and they never have to wait and yes I know they pay for it but them getting to skip the wait line when it’s meant to help get the app up and running again is ridiculous. 

Slow time (or whatever it’s called) and my opinion:
I like it it’s great, it doesn’t interfere with anything but how long it takes for a bit to reply to you.sure it’s annoying because it’s so easy to keep accidentally clicking on it but that’s my only complaint is how if you have your finger remotely near the button to open it it opens it, maybe that’s just a me issue (I’m assuming it is).

AGE RESTRICTION?!: so your telling me that if your under 18 suddenly 17 and under won’t be able to chat when we want because 17 and under people WHO ARE TEENAGERS BY THE WAY, I would understand this if you weren’t a teenager (12 and under) but people use this app to roleplay and vent and your just rolling this out because parents gave you complaints?! You have parental insights why the heck do you suddenly need to do this, do you expected that people will stay through this? Because now yow your turning into Roblox. I’m genuinely so done with this app first it was the adds being put in the chats ( you said you weren’t going to do that if I’m correct) and now this?!

title: Devs blatant disregaurd for feedback.
review:
Since the addition of ads, maybe even before, its been pretty clear that the devs dont really care about what users want. And I honestly understand, you gotta get monetization and turn a profit off of this. I also get the swipe and go on restrictions, even if they're largely hated by the community. But they removed ~7 chat styles (AI models) in favor of two, one which is paid. They opted for better memory but at the cost of extremely flat and repitive responses, watering down personalities into AI's love for nice and boring conversation. which seems like a lose-lose, especially considering they now just hallucinate stuff anyway. A lot of the charm and humor is gone as well from beta, and its increasingly become purple prose/narration focused, when the entire point is to talk to CHARACTERS. And they still havent fixed this problem in their new two models despite it being months, preferring to roll out a third model instead of just tweaking the original issue? Both free models have their downsides as well, and switching them every other message just to get a similiar response is annoying. Its absurd, claiming on reddit that "most of the community likes this!" after having mods actively delete polls with the results showing that, no, we clearly do not....

tldr use janitor ai instead, it has its own free model that, while it has its own faults, can at least stay keep responses fairly in character. rather than making every thing ultra soft and sweet or heartfelt or lunging to kiss you for no reason

title: they’re digging their own grave.
review:
I adore character ai because it’s like an interactive fanfic, but here lately their updates are.. questionable.

• The ADS. The ads are honestly ridiculous. I’ve never had an app have this much ads ever. Luckily, now most of the ads I get are only 30 seconds and can get skipped earlier. I used to get ads that were unskippable, but TWO MINUTES long.

• The chat limit + how much time you have to wait. I’m so confused on why they’d even think to add this?? People aren’t going to use the app for that long, which means they can’t run their ads to them. They want so bad for us to pay for their subscription, but why would you genuinely want to pay for ai. Also, EIGHT hours? Seriously? It’s like c.ai just wants their app to be horrible.

• They’re honestly becoming like all of their other competitors. It’s so sad to see an app with so much potential to get ruined like this. I love the characters people have created on this app, I love talking to them and getting into immersive roleplay. But it feels like c.ai wants to make that impossible.

• I really hope the developers think this through. xx
